build.buildCommand: NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION=false npm install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund && npm --workspace @gta-rp/shared run build && npm --workspace @gta-rp/server run build

variables.name: JWT_SECRET
variables.description: Secret key for JWT signing (min 32 chars). REQUIRED.

variables.name: ADMIN_TOKEN
variables.description: Shared token between Express API and RAGE MP Server bridge. REQUIRED.

variables.name: BOOTSTRAP_FOUNDER_EMAIL
variables.description: Email of the first admin account created on first launch.

variables.name: STARTER_VEHICLE_MODEL
variables.description: Starter vehicle model for new players.
